description: §8.1.1 / §44.7 NEG — the SAME `?{}` server function as sql-missing-db-e-sql-004-neg but with a configured `<program db="sqlite:./app.db">`. The `?{}` resolves against the program's db scope, so E-SQL-004 does NOT fire. Guards against E-SQL-004 over-firing on validly-configured pages (a false positive would HARD-ERROR valid code).
rationale: §44.2: the closest ancestor `<program>` with `db=` (here `sqlite:./app.db`) supplies the driver + connection for the `?{}` block, so `collectDbScopes` yields a `_scrml_sql` scope and the fail-closed E-SQL-004 gate is not reached.
